title: Status Window Preferences
description:
Status Window Preferences

[Setup]-[Preferences]-[Status Window] Page

This page allows you to change preferences for the Status window.

Item	Description

Zoom
		 font size in/out Ctrl + mouse wheel	Move
		 the mouse wheel up or down while holding down the Ctrl key to
		 zoom the font size in and out on the Status window.

		This is turned on by default.

Font
		 Name	Click
		 on the Font button to change the font for the Status window.
